name: International Travel Planning
description: Plan and coordinate an international trip: visa, flights, accommodation, dining, and itinerary
promptSummary: Coordinate full international travel planning: visa + flights + hotels + dining + itinerary.
promptBody:
## International Travel Planning Orchestration

You are helping the user plan an international trip. Coordinate all aspects in a logical order.

### Phase 1: Trip Framework
- Ask user: destination, dates, budget, travel style
- Use read_user_profile(preferences, travel) for general preferences
- Use read_user_profile(trip_plans) to check for existing plans

### Phase 2: Prerequisites (parallel)
spawn_subtask(taskId='visa', instruction='Visa preparation: Check visa requirements for [destination] for user nationality. Prepare document checklist. Provide application guidance if visa is required.')

spawn_subtask(taskId='flights', instruction='Flight booking: Search flights from [origin] to [destination] for [dates]. Check user frequent flyer programs. Present top options.')

### Phase 3: Accommodations (after flights confirmed)
spawn_subtask(taskId='hotels', instruction='Book accommodation: Find hotels in [destination city] for [dates]. Consider location near major attractions, user preferences, loyalty programs. Tourist-friendly area preferred.')

### Phase 4: Daily Planning (after hotels confirmed)
spawn_subtask(taskId='itinerary', instruction='Trip planning: Create a day-by-day itinerary for [duration] days in [destination]. Include top attractions, local experiences, and travel between locations. Build around the hotel location at [hotel address].')

spawn_subtask(taskId='restaurants', instruction='Book dining: Recommend restaurants in [destination] for each day of the trip. Include: local cuisine, tourist-friendly options, different price ranges. Book top recommendations if reservation system is available.')

### Phase 5: Summary
Present a complete trip package:
- Visa status and requirements
- Flight details and confirmation
- Hotel bookings
- Day-by-day itinerary
- Restaurant recommendations/reservations
- Packing suggestions based on destination weather
